arts.ttl: Palladino’s pursuit: Fiorentina’s bold move for Daniel Maldini
arts.sum: Fiorentina are making a serious push to acquire Daniel Maldini, aiming to outmaneuver stiff competition from other Italian clubs. Calciomercato report how the initiative comes directly from manager Raffaele Palladino, who has a high regard for the talented son of Paolo Maldini. Palladino, having previously worked with Daniel, is credited as the coach who best understood, developed, and improved the young player’s abilities. The Viola’s management is intensifying efforts to reach an agreement with Maldini’s agent, Beppe Riso, with a view towards a summer transfer. arts.ttl: De Gea is 34 but making saves like he's 20 and helping Fiorentina mount a title challenge
arts.sum: De Gea is the best-performing keeper in the Italian league and, again, had a crucial part to play on Sunday at Como where, with his team 1-0 up, he pulled off an extraordinary triple save in the second half. Few people put Fiorentina among the Serie A title contenders this season, and fewer thought veteran goalkeeper David De Gea could be on course for another trophy after a year away from soccer.

arts.ttl: Conference League | Fiorentina v Pafos: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: Fiorentina are gearing up for their upcoming UEFA Conference League match with a nearly full-strength squad. The recent return of Danilo Cataldi has bolstered the team’s options, leaving only midfielder Amir Richardson and captain Cristiano Biraghi as potential absentees. Albert Gudmundsson is expected to be available, pending his successful recovery from a thigh injury. Manager Raffaele Palladino is likely to rotate his squad for this European fixture, differing from his usual Serie A lineup. This rotation may see top scorer Moise Kean, who has impressively netted 12 goals in 15 appearances since his move from Juventus, given a rest. arts.ttl: Palladino: “Fiorentina want to qualify among the top 8”
arts.sum: Fiorentina’s coach Raffaele Palladino expressed his determination and optimism ahead of the UEFA Conference League match against Pafos. In an interview with Sky Sport, Palladino stated, “I will try to put the best possible formation on the field; there is a lot of positive energy. We must play a spirited game. arts.ttl: Conference League | Fiorentina v Pafos : Match Prediction, Preview, Team News and Lineups
arts.sum: Fiorentina and Pafos FC are set to clash in a crucial UEFA Conference League match at Stadio Artemio Franchi on Thursday afternoon. Both teams currently find themselves tied in the standings, each with six points from three matches, and are eager to secure a victory that would enhance their chances of finishing in the top eight and advancing to the knockout stages. Fiorentina enter this match following a mixed run in the Conference League, having recently suffered their first defeat of the season against APOEL, losing 2-1 in Nicosia.
